svg.text: Supply: vdd_comp = 1.8 V | Threshold: PVDD < 4.3 V | uv_flag = HIGH when undervoltage
.subckt uv_comparator pvdd vref uv_flag vdd_comp gnd en

UV hysteresis = 63.5 mV spec 50 - 150 mV PASS
UV de-assertion (rising) = 4.353 V within spec window PASS
Response time = < 0.01 us spec <= 5 us PASS
Power (from vdd_comp) = 2.71 uA spec <= 5 uA PASS
Threshold error = 5.2 mV spec <= 200 mV PASS
